title: Shark Navigator Lift-Away Professional Upright Vacuum NV352
summary: The Shark Navigator Lift-Away NV352 is one of the best-selling upright vacuums in America for good reason. The detachable pod lets you convert it from a full upright to a portable canister in seconds. Our research confirms it delivers strong suction, excellent filtration, and outstanding value.
pros: Lift-Away design converts to portable canister vacuum
Never loses suction — consistent from full to empty bin
Lightweight at 12.5 lbs despite large capacity
cons: Corded — limited by cord length (25 ft)
Dustbin can be tricky to empty without releasing dust
Brush roll not ideal for very thick carpets
Hose is shorter than some competitors
bestFor: Pet owners dealing with hair on carpets and furniture
Allergy sufferers who need HEPA filtration
Those wanting a versatile vacuum under $150
verdict: The Shark Navigator NV352 is the vacuum we recommend to almost everyone. It delivers premium features — HEPA filtration, Lift-Away design, swivel steering — at a mid-range price. Our research consistently confirms it outperforms more expensive competitors.
